response.justification: Bogdan is a strong hands-on polyglot engineer with roughly 19 years of experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, and he meets the minimum bar of a technical bachelor's plus 15 years in software engineering. However, this is a director-level IC role centered on AI strategy, and his profile is that of a senior/staff product engineer: his AI exposure (MCP tooling, agentic workflows at re:cinq) is recent and infrastructure-adjacent rather than recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products, and there is no evidence of organization-level technical leadership, strategic advisory work, or cloud platform strategy at the scope this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption via Green Map
Active knowledge-sharer with conference talks (FOSS4G) and multi-day workshops, aligning with the role's inspire-and-evangelize responsibility
concerns: No demonstrated AI depth: AI-agent tooling work only since April 2025, no ML/AI products, publications, or advanced AI-related degree
Career level gap: consistently senior/staff developer roles with no principal, director, or engineering-leadership scope influencing product or platform strategy
Cloud experience is practitioner-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments) rather than defining the future state of cloud products or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategy scope
Meets minimum qualifications (BS + 15 years engineering) with founder experience
